content:
It looks like you're using brave browser.

There's a bug report I've found for another app stating that 'Brave Shield' is blocking oAuth flow for their app. See this github report. https://github.com/appwrite/appwrite/issues/9292

Possibly your experiencing the same issue with TBA. Can you try temporarily disabling 'Brave Shield' if applicable. I'm not familiar with Brave browsers features.

You could also try setting a different default browser and see if the issue continues.
creator: platform34

content: @Platform34, thank you for the quick response! I tried what you said, it did not help. I also tried setting Firefox and Chromium as default browsers, but that also did not help. For what it's worth, the photos that you see with the Brave icon are within the TBA app-window. Is it possible that TBA jumped over to borrow a browser just to do the OAuth check? And if so, it picked Brave for the task every time (even when the other browsers were made to be default).
creator: maguster
